# Members

A searchable directory of everyone in the organisation.

[← Back to features](README.md)

## Directory

- Search by name or email
- Filter by membership status (active / expired)
- Filter by tag
- View role, tags, and membership renewal period on each card

## Member profiles

Click a member to open their profile page with:

- Contact details and role
- Membership renewal history
- [Accreditation](mentors.md) assignments
- Tags

Membership periods and assignments are managed from [Admin → Membership](admin.md#membership).
